🐍
python · zero to oop hero

Badge Gallery &
Recognition System

Collect badges as you progress through lessons, contribute to the repo, and help the community grow.

Progress Learning Milestones
🌱 Beginner
You've taken your first steps. Variables, types, loops — you've got this.
How to earn
  • Complete lessons 01–03
  • Pass exercises ex_01, ex_02, ex_03
  • Open a PR with your solutions
🔥 Intermediate
Functions, collections, real logic. You're writing code that actually does things.
How to earn
  • Complete lessons 04–05
  • Pass exercises ex_04, ex_05
  • Build the grade tracker mini-project
🏆 OOP Master
Classes, inheritance, encapsulation, magic methods. You think in objects now.
How to earn
  • Complete lessons 06–09
  • Finish the Library System challenge
  • Build & share your own OOP project
Contribution Community Roles
🤝 Contributor
You improved the repo. Fixed something, added something, helped someone.
How to earn
  • Have 1+ merged pull request
  • Follows contribution guidelines
  • Passes CI checks
🐛 Bug Hunter
You found and fixed a bug. The code is cleaner because of you.
How to earn
  • Report a valid, confirmed bug
  • Optionally: fix it in a PR
  • Include steps to reproduce
🚀 First PR
Your very first pull request. Every legend had one.
How to earn
  • Open your first PR to this repo
  • Any valid contribution counts
  • Awarded automatically on merge
✍️ Lesson Author
You wrote educational content that helps other learners. That's impactful.
How to earn
  • Write & PR a new lesson or exercise
  • Follows lesson format guidelines
  • Content reviewed and merged
